name: Jam Kolaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and cream cheese together using an electric mixer, beating at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add the flour to the creamed mixture, stirring well until combined.
3. Roll the dough out on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
4. Cut the rolled dough into rounds using a 2-5/8-inch cookie cutter.
5. Place the dough rounds onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
6. Spoon about 1/4 teaspoon of jam onto each dough round.
7. Fold the opposite sides together to center, slightly overlapping the edges.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
9. Cool on wire racks and sprinkle with sifted powdered sugar.
Yield: About 3-1/2 dozen kolaches.
